meaning: n.财政家,金融家vi.欺骗性地从事金融活动,欺骗,骗取
examples: Warren Buffett, the good natured financier, became a homespun folk hero, without the tools and overalls.
At mid-century, an Antwerp financier only slightly exaggerated when he claimed, "One can no more trade without bills of an exchange than sail without water."
My background is as a financier.
Luckily, she had an uncle qualified and ready to play mentor and eventually financier.
The status of Wall Street financier Steven Rattner remains unresolved in the pension fund case.
